hero.headline: Feeling like something's not quite right?
hero.subheadline: Connect with experienced, registered psychologists from the comfort of your home. Check your eligibility for our introductory first-session offer in under a minute.

eligibility_text: I have a valid Mental Health Care Plan from my GP
eligibility_helper: This allows Medicare rebates for psychology sessions

email_capture.heading: Where should we send your offer details?

offer.heading: You're eligible for our introductory offer
offer.value_text: Your first session is fully covered after rebate
offer.subtext: Secure your appointment with a $98.95 upfront payment. After your session, the full amount is rebated.

psychologist_selection.heading: Choose the psychologist who feels like the best fit

booking_bridge.heading: Almost there - next you'll choose a time
booking_bridge.subheading: You'll be redirected to our secure booking platform
booking_bridge.step1: View available appointments for your chosen psychologist
booking_bridge.step2: Enter your details to secure your booking
booking_bridge.important_note: Select '50-minute session', then available session times will appear. Please keep your discount code handy.
booking_bridge.footer_note: You'll be redirected to Halaxy, our secure booking platform
